Video.summary: British sailor Edward falls in love with Manuela Cortez against her father's wishes.
Video.title: Ship of No Return

Video.summary: A captain tries to clear a trading post owner accused of selling ammunition to the enemy.
Video.title: A Bullet for the Captain

Video.summary: Mystery shrouds a stage robbery when the alleged culprit is killed before he can be questioned.
Video.title: Stagecoach Spy

Video.summary: The Rosetti family and fellow Italian immigrants look forward to new freedoms in the American West.
Video.title: The Invaders

Video.summary: A white man who lives among Native tribes tries to foil a plot to steal gold claims from their land.
Video.title: The Blond King

Video.summary: A man goes too far promoting a phony religious philosophy based on the novel The Gates Ajar.
Video.title: Gates Ajar Morgan

Video.summary: Sam Kee, ostracized because he's Chinese, finds refuge at a fort after saving a soldier's life.
Video.title: Sam Kee and Uncle Sam

Video.summary: After a skirmish with hostile Natives, prisoners arrive at the fort, including an ill girl.
Video.title: Indian Emily

Video.summary: Lew Wallace is governor of New Mexico Territory during Billy the Kid's murderous era in the 1880s.
Video.title: Shadows on the Window

Video.summary: Entrepreneur Levi Strauss starts the world's first blue jean manufacturer.
Video.title: The Million Dollar Pants

Video.summary: A sailor, a barmaid and a newspaperman join forces to clean up a lawless city.
Video.title: Pirates of San Francisco

Video.summary: Townspeople plan a vendetta when a Mexican outlaw is accused of killing four miners.
Video.title: Eagle in the Rocks

Video.summary: A singer wants to give up the fame and return home.
Video.title: Emma Is Coming

Video.summary: A Native chief's young widow fights an ancient ritual following her husband's death.
Video.title: Human Sacrifice

Video.summary: A widow's ranch is requisitioned by the Union Army, making her the target of Confederate cavalrymen.
Video.title: Splinter Station

Video.summary: A detective falls in love while investigating the smuggling of high-grade ore out of a mine.
Video.title: Queen of the High Graders

Video.summary: Yvonne DeCarlo plays a doctor struggling to begin a medical practice as a woman in the 1890s.
Video.title: The Lady Was an M.D.

Video.summary: A ghost-plagued woman hires a detective to take her and her fortune to San Francisco.
Video.title: South of Horror Flats

Video.summary: A group of religious settlers tangles with outlaws who have set up an illegal tollgate.
Video.title: Dangerous Crossing

Video.summary: A woman prospector, her long-lost husband and a timid man create a love triangle.
Video.title: Big Liz

Video.summary: Trappers look for an escape when they're imprisoned by the Mexican governor of San Diego.
Video.title: Price of a Passport

Video.summary: The end of the Mexican-American War leads to disputes between land-owning families and new settlers.
Video.title: Perilous Refuge

Video.summary: A doctor, ostracized after allowing a patient to die, gets a chance at redemption.
Video.title: The Scalpel and the Gun

Video.summary: A miner discovers a vein rich in ore near his claim after giving half of his stake to a singer.
Video.title: Ten Feet of Nothing

Video.summary: A vagabond finds stolen riches and becomes a philanthropist.
Video.title: Money to Burn

Video.summary: In the years after California's conquest, an Army commander grapples with hostile citizens.
Video.title: Goodbye Five Hundred Pesos

Video.summary: When a deadly illness breaks out among the Natives, Lt. Wood is willing to treat them, for a price.
Video.title: The White Healer

Video.summary: An ex-con tries to prevent the son he gave up for adoption from following in his steps.
Video.title: The Young Gun

Video.summary: When Claypool swindles McSween out of his gold mine, storekeeper Hobart has an idea for retribution.
Video.title: Loophole

Video.summary: A condemned outlaw is offered his freedom if he helps capture his criminal friend.
Video.title: The Informer Who Cried

Video.summary: A tomboy changes her ways when she meets the handsome constable of a mining town.
Video.title: The Indiana Girl

Video.summary: A man fights an oyster boat captain.
Video.title: Prince of the Oyster Pirates

Video.summary: A desert dwelling couple struggle with life in Death Valley.
Video.title: Dress for a Desert Girl

Video.summary: Citizens gather to watch a man make good on his claim that his horse can swim the Catalina Channel.
Video.title: The World's Greatest Swimming Horse

Video.summary: Renegade Natives led by a white man named Clay threaten the residents of a decommissioned fort.
Video.title: Long Night at Fort Lonely

Video.summary: The honeymoon is over when Jim Dayton's wife stumbles onto his past.
Video.title: Jimmy Dayton's Bonanza

Video.summary: Three orphaned children continue their parents' quest for gold.
Video.title: The Tenderfoot

Video.summary: A physician courts disaster by aiding one of two feuding Natives.
Video.title: The Lady Doctor

Video.summary: A young man hunts for gold, hoping to impress his girl so she'll accept his proposal.
Video.title: The Mezcla Man

Video.summary: Maso and Okei, tea growers in Gold Hills, encounter both friendship and racism from the locals.
Video.title: The Dragon of Gold Hill

Video.summary: A loveless woman baker decides to leave, causing her town to lose its only pie supplier.
Video.title: The Solid Gold Pie

Video.summary: John Clum is given a task of turning a group of Apache men into a force that aids the U.S. Calvary.
Video.title: Clum's Constabulary

Video.summary: Two members of a wagon train try to reach help before their group dies of starvation.
Video.title: Out of the Valley of Death

Image.alt: Out of the Valley of Death
Out of the Valley of Death
Out of the Valley of Death
Out of the Valley of Death
Out of the Valley of Death
Out of the Valley of Death
Out of the Valley of Death
Out of the Valley of Death
Out of the Valley of Death

Video.summary: After a trip to town, two miners find gold nuggets mixed with beans they bought.
Video.title: The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt

Image.alt: The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
